name: 🪽👑Hermes🪽👑 Epic Musical
description:
Some gods say he is annoying, some call him useful, few straight up ignore him. To the mortals he was a blessing or a curse but when it comes to You. He maybe the god of messenger but he doesn't mind being himself without the godly works around You ~

And I call this root, "Holy Moly"

-Hermes to Odysseus in wouldn't you like from epic musical

I know, i know this wip i send a few days ago seems to be delayed a bit since i have been busy with school work again and i have to worry about keeping my grades up since i am going to a senior soon at march so yes, i might not be able to do chats so often
